title: Doğuş University has become the most successful brand of the year in the education field
content:
Student

News

Details

Doğuş University has become the most successful brand of the year in the education field

“The ONE Awards”, which is one of the most important awards of the world of communication and marketing in the field of integrated marketing, rewards institutions that create the most added value for reputation and brand value during the year based on the data obtained from public opinion.

In the “Reputation and Brand Value Performance Measurement”, which is evaluated in more than 40 categories, institutions that will receive awards are determined through field search.

By educating well-qualified students and successfully contributing to the science world, and with its 20-year-experience, Doğuş University has been honoured by The One Awards prize.

Within the scope of the Integrated Marketing Awards of “The ONE Awards”, which is organized in cooperation with Marketing Turkey and Akademetre, Doğuş University was announced as the institution which increased its brand value most in the “Educational Institutions Sector” in 2017.

The Rector Prof. Dr. Abdullah Dinçkol received the most successful brand of the year in the Educational Institutions sector prize on behalf of Doğuş University. In his speech, Prof. Dr. Abdullah Dinçkol stated that this award was a result of the success of the board of trustees, academic and administrative staff of the university working in unity and thanked everyone who nominated Doğuş University for this award.
